validation.fixErrors: Please fix the errors before continuing
validation.fixErrorsForm: Please fix the errors in the form
validation.otpCodeRequired: Please enter a valid 6-digit OTP code
validation.passwordBetween8and16: Password must be between 8 and 16 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
validation.passwordSpecialChars: Password can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores

resetPassword.title: Secure Your Account.
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the OTP sent to your email and create a new strong password to keep your account safe.
resetPassword.instruction: Enter the OTP code sent to
resetPassword.instruction2: Then create a new, strong password for your account.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.subtitle: Update your password to keep your account secure
changePassword.instruction: Enter your current password and choose a new one
changePassword.requirement2: Must include at least one uppercase and one lowercase letter
changePassword.requirement3: Include at least one number, and only letters, numbers, underscores are allowed
